title: Colorful Hearts + Mandala's GUI - Dark mode
description: Changes 'Colorful Hearts' mod's icons to be in the style of Mandala's GUI dark mode.
body:
This pack applies the style of "Mandala's GUI - Dark Mode" to the mod "Colorful Hearts" to keep the hearts consistent in the GUI. Check out the original projects!

Mandala's GUI-Dark Mode: https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mandalas-gui-dark-mode

Colorful Hearts: https://modrinth.com/mod/colorful-hearts

All credit for the design and functionality goes to the creators of these projects, this is just a compatibility mod!
